title: HOMESHOPA 30Pk Neon Plastic Shot Glasses 28ml, 1oz Reusable Colourful Rainbow Vodka Shot Cups, Perfect Tumblers for Drinking Games, Sample Tasting, Wedding, Camping, Travel, Birthday Party & Events
features: Vibrant Neon Colors: Brighten up your parties and celebrations with our Neon Plastic Shot Glasses! Designed to add a splash of vibrant color to any event, these durable and lightweight shot glasses are perfect for serving drinks, desserts, or creative cocktails. Whether it’s a birthday, wedding, or casual gathering, their eye-catching neon hues guarantee fun and lively vibes for every occasion. Reusable and easy to clean, they are a must-have for hosts who love to entertain with style and flair.
Durable and Lightweight: Made from high-quality plastic, these disposable mini cups are sturdy yet lightweight, making them ideal for both indoor and outdoor use without the worry of breakage.

Versatile Party Essential: Perfect for serving shots, mini desserts, or creative appetizers, these sample testing glasses are a versatile addition to your party supplies, catering to all kinds of celebrations.

Reusable and Eco-Friendly: Designed for multiple uses, these reusable neon glasses can be easily washed and reused, offering a practical and environmentally friendly alternative to disposable partyware.
Compact and Convenient: With a stackable design, these colourful shot glasses are easy to store and transport, ensuring hassle-free party prep and cleanup every time.
Ideal for All Occasions: From birthdays and weddings to festivals and casual gatherings, these neon shot glasses are the perfect way to liven up any occasion and impress your guests.
